description: Load compact Mandaloria rules without preloading all project documentation.

hooks.command: sh -c 'root="$PWD"; while [ "$root" != / ] && [ ! -f "$root/.agent/hooks/load-context.mjs" ]; do root=$(dirname "$root"); done; [ -f "$root/.agent/hooks/load-context.mjs" ] && exec node "$root/.agent/hooks/load-context.mjs"'
